pi_items.source: Web search confirmed: https://www.kaggle.com/datasets/vivek468/superstore-dataset-final and multiple other public sources reference this dataset

privileged_info_summary: The shipping_geo_analysis task references 'superstore_orders.csv' as its data source, a real and widely-used public Superstore dataset available on Kaggle containing order data with columns Order Date, Ship Date, Ship Mode, State, Region, and Sales. However, this dataset is not provided in the environment. The task directory lacks the required setup_task.ps1 and export_result.ps1 hook files that other similar tasks have. The only available CSV files are sales_data.csv (1000 rows, 14 columns for sales transactions), employee_performance.csv (1000 rows, 12 HR columns), and website_analytics.csv (250 rows, 13 analytics columns). The required visuals (Map, Stacked Area Chart, Funnel) and DAX calculations (Delivery_Days, Avg_Delivery_Days) are properly specified in the task description.
